title: Sub items can be connected to another boards - same as a task
excerpt: Sub items cant be linked the same as a task, it would be good if this was possible, currently i can only link a subitems to a task on another board but i have to manually click and add that sub item and then it works as …

posts.author: matt.dowson (Matt)
posts.cookedHtml: Sub items cant be linked the same as a task, it would be good if this was possible, currently i can only link a subitems to a task on another board but i have to manually click and add that sub item and then it works as normal, why is it not automated like normal connected tasks?

posts.author: chris1058 (chris)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, @matt.dowson
It sounds like you’re looking for a way to automate linking subitems to tasks, similar to how connected tasks work. This is a common challenge in project management tools.

Current Manual Process
Linking Subitems: You manually click and add subitems to tasks on another board.
Desired Automation
Automated Linking: Ideally, subitems should link automatically to tasks without manual intervention.
Possible Solution
Automation Tools: Consider using automation features or integrations within your project management tool. For example, tools like Zapier can automate workflows by linking tasks and subitems across different boards.
Example Workflow
Trigger: When a new subitem is created.
Action: Automatically link the subitem to a specified task.
This approach can save time and ensure consistency. If your current tool doesn’t support this, exploring third-party automation tools might be the way to go.

Let me know if you need more details or assistance
Best regards
Chris wright
